title: Payload — cypherx.tenant.suspended
description: Contract 13 tenant-lifecycle payload. Emitted by Auth on px0 `org.suspended`, billing failure, admin action, or self-serve cancellation. On consumption all agents for the tenant are marked `status='suspended'` and Auth rejects new tokens (`TENANT_SUSPENDED`). Carried inside the Kafka event envelope `payload` field. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields (additionalProperties:true).

tenant_id.description: Isolation-boundary UUID of the suspended tenant (Contract 13).

suspended_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) at which the tenant was suspended.
